subtitle: Santiago and Valparaíso
intro: A slower five-day route combining neighbourhood walks, independent food, local design and coastal viewpoints. All content is demonstration data and must be verified before customer use.

days.summary: Settle in, learn the immediate area and begin with an unhurried evening.

activities.title: Arrival and neighbourhood orientation
activities.description: Check in, confirm tomorrow’s transport options and take a short orientation walk around your accommodation area.

activities.title: Lastarria evening walk
activities.description: Explore a compact cultural district at a gentle pace, noting galleries, bookshops and places to return to later.

days.summary: A full day organised by neighbourhood to reduce unnecessary travel.

activities.title: Independent breakfast and market context
activities.description: Begin with a locally owned café, then walk through a nearby market area to understand everyday food culture rather than treating the market as a checklist stop.

activities.title: Museum or design-space choice
activities.description: Choose one focused cultural visit according to your energy and interests. Keep the other as a weather-proof alternative.

activities.title: Late-afternoon city viewpoint
activities.description: Reach a viewpoint before the evening rush, allowing time for changing light rather than a rushed photo stop.

days.theme: Travel to the coast and explore by hillside
days.summary: Travel in the morning and organise the afternoon around one connected hillside area.

activities.title: Transfer to Valparaíso
activities.description: Use the confirmed intercity connection and keep the booking reference available offline. Allow extra time between arrival and the first planned activity.

activities.title: Cerro Alegre and Concepción walking route
activities.description: Follow a connected route through hillside streets, small galleries and viewpoints. Avoid trying to cover every mural or funicular in one afternoon.
activities.verification: Demo — review route and local conditions

activities.title: Small-plate dinner near your return route
activities.description: Choose a verified independent restaurant close to the route back to your accommodation, rather than crossing the city again at night.

days.theme: Port history and a flexible creative afternoon
days.summary: Combine one contextual morning visit with a choice-led afternoon.

activities.title: Port-city context walk
activities.description: Use a short guided or self-guided route to connect the port, migration history and the city’s distinctive urban form.
activities.verification: Demo — verify route safety and access

activities.title: Choose-your-energy afternoon
activities.description: Select one option: a design-focused visit, an extended café stop with sketching, or a second hillside walk. The app should present only verified alternatives.

days.summary: Leave room for one meaningful return visit rather than filling every remaining hour.

activities.title: Return to your favourite area
activities.description: Use saved places and personal notes to revisit the area that felt most rewarding, then collect luggage and continue your journey.

practicalInfo.title: Before departure
items: Download or print essential booking references.
Confirm entry requirements, insurance and current transport information from official sources.
Verify all places marked as demonstration data before publishing the customer trip.

practicalInfo.title: Offline use
items: Open every app section once while connected so the latest version is cached.
Map navigation opens an external map service and normally requires a connection or downloaded map area.
Saved places, completion status and notes are stored only in this browser on this device.

practicalInfo.title: Emergency information
items: Replace this demonstration section with verified official emergency numbers and embassy guidance for the customer.
Do not store passport scans, medical records or payment information in this static app.
